name: Fossil Ridge Storage Bench Beige - Signature Design by Ashley
description: Something old, something new. Rough and smooth come together in this bench, outfitted with vintage-inspired details like the classic “X” motif in charming antique blue. Cleverly designed with hidden storage space, this multi-functional piece is a fresh take on tried and true style. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
